title: Inferring Cell Type Relationships and Linking Genomic Annotations to Cell Type Hierarchies Using CellWalker2
author: Hu, Zhirui
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This release includes updated CellWalker2 source code and revised vignettes that demonstrate its application in accordance with the STAR protocol. The R scripts for running the protocol are vignettes/Protocol.R and vignettes/Protocol2-1.R.
steps_raw: This release includes updated CellWalker2 source code and revised vignettes that demonstrate its application in accordance with the STAR protocol. The R scripts for running the protocol are vignettes/Protocol.R and vignettes/Protocol2-1.R.
